case_title: PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES et al vs. WILBERT, WESLEY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES HONIG, JUDITH, TRUSTEES SERVED OCT-13-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILBERT, WESLEY

DEPT.#14, HALL OF JUSTICE JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN RPT: CARL SAUCEDA CLERK: GUY DECKER 1:30 CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS, JUDITH HONIG & GARY PASQUINELLI,PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF, WESLEY WILBERT, PRESENT & IN PRO PER. 1:31 PL, JUDITH HONIG MAKES OPENING REMARKS. 1:34 PL. EXH.#1, 3-DAY NOTICE, MARKED FOR ID. & MOVED INTO EVID. 1:40 RECESS. 1:45 COURT AGAIN IN SESSION. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. 1:46 PAINTIFFS, JUDITH HONIG & GARY PASQUINELLI, SWORN JOINTLY. MS. HONIG GIVES DIRECT TESTIMONY IN NARRATIVE. 1:50 CROSS-EXAM OF MS. HONIG BY DEF. 1:55 MR. PASQUINELLI GIVES DIRECT TESTIMONY IN NARRATIVE. 1:57 DEF. WAIVES CROSS-EXAM OF MR. PASQUINELLI. MR. WILBERT AFFIRMS TO TELL THE TRUTH & GIVES DIRECT TESTIMONY. 2:05 CROSS-EXAM OF MR. WILBERT BY MS. HONIG. 2:07 REDIRECT BY MR. WILBERT IN NARRATIVE. 2:08 DEF. WIT, JADE ASCHER, S&E. 2:15 PL. HONIG'S CROSS-EXAM OF MR. ASCHER. 2:17 REDIRECT OF MR. ASCHER. 2:22 NO CLOSING ARGUEMNTS MADE BY PL. & DEF. CASE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
PHOTOCOPY FOR 3 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 110683. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES HONIG, JUDITH, TRUSTEES AS TO DEFENDANT WILBERT, WESLEY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR WILEY, JOHN W. R. AS ATTORNEY FOR PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES HONIG, JUDITH, TRUSTEES
CASE TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. #14, FOR CT. TRIAL AT 1:30PM; DEFT. DID NOT EXCERCISE 170.6CCP CHALLENGE IN DEPT. #1; IT IS TO CONSIDERED UNTIMELY IF DEFT. TRIES TO EXCERCISE THE CHALLENGE IN DEPT. #14.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WILBERT, WESLEY

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASQUINELLI, GARY, TRUSTEES HONIG, JUDITH, TRUSTEES COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEPT. #1: DEFT'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DENIED; DEFT. WALKED OUT OF COURT ROOM AT 10:14AM.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WILBERT, WESLEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WILBERT, WESLEY DEFT IS ORDERED TO PAY PLTFS $407.88 ON OR BEFORE 12/2/94. IF NOT PAID BY 12/2/94 AT 4:30 PM, PLTFS ENTITLED TO A WRIT OF EXECUTION OF POSSESSION OF 2602 SUTTER STREET, SF, CA AND THE SUM OF $407.88 UPON WRITTEN EX-PARTE NOTICE OF MOTION TO BE SERVED UPON DEFT. AT LEAST 24 HOURS BEFORE HEARING.
